utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format contains 6 items: property; financing; legal_services; moving_services; setup_services; total_budget. The final property solution includes all 6 of these sections. Now check if each is fully specified: 1) property: includes selected property with details and price (address, price, specs, viewing date, closing date) — fully specified. 2) financing: includes financing solution with terms (provider, loan amount, down payment, interest rate, monthly payment, amortization, arrangement fee) — fully specified. 3) legal_services: includes legal services with costs (firm, contact, services, cost, timeline) — fully specified. 4) moving_services: includes moving arrangements with costs (company, contact, services, cost, date) — fully specified. 5) setup_services: utility and setup services (utilities with providers, dates, and cost; property_survey with provider, contact, date, cost) — fully specified. 6) total_budget: complete cost breakdown (price, down payment, various fees, taxes, insurance, totals, monthly payment) — fully specified. Therefore all 6/6 items are covered.
